content.en:
Dealing with the Demon Seed Abyss?

The peak realm gods frowned slightly, although they had all had this idea.

However, their strength is not much different from that of the Demon Seed Abyss, and the peak demon seeds of the Demon Seed Abyss still have the means to influence their Eternal Dao Seed, even if they are peak realm gods, they dare not say that they cannot be transformed by the Demon Seed.

Therefore, if they want to completely crush the abyss of the demon seed, it is impossible.

If a war is waged, both sides will suffer heavy losses.

In the past, the realm god realm and the demon seed abyss were killed, and none of them, the peak realm gods, really made a move.

If a war really breaks out, how many peak realm gods will have to fall!

A pinnacle realm god said: "Liangyi Realm God, our strength is about the same as the demon seed abyss, once we invade the demon seed abyss, under the suppression of the will of the demon seed abyss, we will be in a weak position!"

Demon Seed Abyss Will!

The other peak realm gods nodded slightly, they were also afraid of the Demon Seed Abyss Will, which was an existence that could not be resisted.

Once they are suppressed by the will of the Demon Seed Abyss, they are not opponents at all, and if they forcibly invade the Demon Seed Abyss, they may end up with the annihilation of the entire 413 Army.

In this case, the gods of the Liangyi Realm still want to invade the Demon Seed Abyss, what kind of invasion?

Seeing that many peak realm gods disagreed, the Liangyi Realm God said: "Everyone, since I have proposed this plan, I am naturally sure. First of all, let's talk about the problem of the will of the demon seed abyss, the will of the demon seed abyss is different from the will of our realm god realm and the eternal realm, it has mutated and has self-consciousness, so it will cause the demon seed abyss to be very terrifying. But we have a way to seal the will of the Demon Seed Abyss. "

"The will to seal the Demon Seed Abyss?"

Many peak realm gods thought it was incredible, that was the will of the demon seed abyss!

In terms of level, the will of the Demon Seed Abyss can be regarded as a superdimensional level, unless there is a peak realm god who comprehends the true superdimensional power, there is a way to influence and even suppress the will of the Demon Seed Abyss.

Wow!

The god of the Liangyi Realm took out a bead.

"This is a super secret treasure!"

Many peak realm gods recognized it, but they didn't know what the use of this super dimensional secret treasure was.

The god of the Liangyi Realm said: "This is the medium super-dimensional secret treasure - the Forbidden Zero Bead, which specializes in sealing the will-type extra-dimensional creatures, and the will of the Demon Seed Abyss is actually a will-type extra-dimensional creature, and the Forbidden Zero Bead is its nemesis, which is enough to seal the will of the Demon Seed Abyss." "

"Liangyi Realm God, where did you get the Forbidden Zero Bead?"

They were curious.

After all, they haven't seen this thing in the Garanbao ship, and if they do, they will definitely find a way to exchange for one!

"This is not purchased from the Garanbao ship, but a pinnacle realm god from our two realms gate who once followed the ship entrusted a pinnacle realm god from the garanbao ship to bring it over. "The Shinto of the Liangyi Realm.

"I see!"

Many pinnacle realm gods understood.

Many of their supreme forces also have many peak realm gods who have left this territory through the Garlan Treasure Ship and entered other territories, although most of them have almost no news, but there are also a very small number of Peak Realm Gods who can occasionally contact them through the Garan Treasure Ship, and some are even simply employees of the Garlan Treasure Ship, even if they are no longer the pinnacle realm gods in their forces, they can still get some good things.

However, the Peak Realm God who was able to entrust the Garlan Treasure Ship to bring things over, that Peak Realm God was definitely very well mixed.

At this time, the Liangyi Realm God continued: "The peak realm god of our Two Realms Gate has joined another force that is no less than the Garan Treasure Ship, and has successfully comprehended the true extradimensional power, and now he has advanced to a half-step extradimensional realm. And he not only sent the Forbidden Zero Bead, but also sent a big killing weapon, which was enough to deal with the Demon Seed Abyss. "

The Liangyi Realm God sneered: "Everyone, you are thinking too much, it would be very good if that person could give us something." Whether it's the Forbidden Zero Bead or the Great Killing Weapon, it's just that it's very precious in our eyes, but the other realms may just be ordinary things, not worth much Galanbao coins. And the Garanbao ship will not sell this kind of treasure, it is not as precious as we imagined. That half-step extradimensional realm can't give us too many resources, so we still have to rely on grabbing. "

"Liangyi Realm God, what kind of big killing weapon is that?"

They asked curiously.

"I won't tell you for the time being, you just need to know that I have a way to deal with the Demon Seed Abyss. Of course, you need to be involved. When the time comes, it's up to you how many extra-dimensional resources you can snatch, how about it?"

The Liangyi Realm Gods looked around, waiting for an answer from these peak realm gods. []

"I agree!"

"We'd love to join!"

"Willing to join!"

Ye Tian was also willing to participate, after all, killing the peak demon seed in the abyss of the demon seed was undoubtedly to eradicate the enemy, which was also good for the human race.

Also, you can get some resources by the way, so why not!

But.

Whether he could completely destroy the Demon Seed Abyss this time, he didn't know very well.

He was only worried about one situation, that is, there might be a big killer weapon on the side of the Demon Seed Abyss.

After all, the peak demon seed of the demon seed abyss has also left this territory, and maybe there will be a peak demon seed that has stepped into the half-step transcendent realm, in case some big killing weapons are also sent.

When the time comes, I am afraid that these supreme forces will be in danger.

Soon, they specified a rough plan, and each supreme force would target the forces of the demon seed abyss, but the most dangerous place was naturally handed over to the six supreme gods to deal with.

In order to prevent the news from leaking, they made every peak realm god make an oath and execute this plan as soon as possible.

After the major peak realm gods returned, they began to gather the peak realm gods and prepare to converge with the peak realm gods of other supreme forces to invade the demon seed abyss.

......

this day.

A large number of peak realm gods gathered at the Realm Court headquarters, and this time the number far exceeded the past.

Immediately, they began to break directly into the Demon Seed Abyss from a boundary rift.

In this battle, not only the peak realm gods participated in the battle, but also a large number of high-level realm gods participated in the battle, and these high-level realm gods mainly dealt with high-level demon seeds.

As for the weaker realm gods, there is no need to participate in the war, otherwise they will be reduced to cannon fodder, and there is no point.

The real battlefield victory or defeat depends on the war between the peak realm gods and the peak demon seeds.,Whoever wins,That's the real win.。。
